```text
    51→
    52→function walk(dir: string): string[] {
    53→  return readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true }).flatMap((entry) => {
    54→    const fullPath = join(dir, entry.name)
    55→
    56→    return entry.isDirectory() ? walk(fullPath) : [fullPath]
    57→  })
    58→}
    59→
    60→function flattenMessages(
    61→  input: Record<string, unknown>,
    62→  prefix = '',
    63→): string[] {
    64→  return Object.entries(input).flatMap(([key, value]) => {
    65→    const nextKey = prefix ? `${prefix}.${key}` : key
    66→
    67→    if (value && typeof value === 'object' && !Array.isArray(value)) {
    68→      return flattenMessages(value as Record<string, unknown>, nextKey)
    69→    }
    70→
    71→    return [nextKey]
    72→  })
    73→}
    74→
    75→function collectMessageKeys(locale: string) {
    76→  const localeRoot = join(messagesRoot, locale)
    77→
    78→  return Object.fromEntries(
    79→    walk(localeRoot)
    80→      .filter((file) => file.endsWith('.json'))
    81→      .map((file) => {
    82→        const namespace = file.slice(localeRoot.length + 1, -'.json'.length)
    83→        const json = JSON.parse(
    84→          readFileSync(file, 'utf8'),
    85→        ) as Record<string, unknown>
    86→
    87→        return [namespace, flattenMessages(json)]
    88→      }),
    89→  ) as Record<string, string[]>
    90→}
    91→
    92→function collectSourceFiles() {
    93→  return walk(srcRoot).filter(
    94→    (file) =>
    95→      /\.(ts|tsx)$/.test(file) &&
    96→      !file.includes('/messages/') &&
    97→      !file.endsWith('message-usage.test.ts'),

    99→}
   100→
   101→function collectUsedKeys() {

   109→
   110→    for (const match of source.matchAll(
   111→      /const\s+(\w+)\s*=\s*(?:await\s+)?(?:useTranslations|getTranslations)\(\s*(?:'([^']+)'|"([^"]+)"|\{\s*namespace:\s*('([^']+)'|"([^"]+)")\s*\})/g,
   112→    )) {
   113→      const variableName = match[1]
   114→      const namespace =
   115→        match[2] || match[3] || match[5]?.slice(1, -1) || match[6]?.slice(1, -1)
   116→
   117→      if (variableName && namespace) {
   118→        translationVars.set(variableName, namespace)
   119→      }
   120→    }
   121→
   122→    for (const match of source.matchAll(
   123→      /import\s+(\w+)\s+from\s+['"][~.]?\/?messages\/(?:en|ja|zh)\/([^'"]+)\.json['"]/g,
   124→    )) {
   125→      jsonVars.set(match[1], match[2])
   126→    }
   127→
   128→    for (const [variableName, namespace] of translationVars) {
   129→      const translationPattern = new RegExp(
   130→        String.raw`${variableName}(?:\.(?:rich|raw|markup))?\(\s*['"]([^'"]+)['"]`,
   131→        'g',
   132→      )
   133→
   134→      for (const match of source.matchAll(translationPattern)) {
   135→        if (!usage.has(namespace)) {
   136→          usage.set(namespace, new Set())
   137→        }
   138→        usage.get(namespace)!.add(match[1])
   139→      }
   140→    }
   141→
   142→    for (const [variableName, namespace] of jsonVars) {
   143→      const dotPropertyPattern = new RegExp(

   145→        'g',
   146→      )
   147→      const bracketPropertyPattern = new RegExp(

   149→        'g',
   150→      )
   151→
   152→      for (const match of source.matchAll(dotPropertyPattern)) {
```

```text
    16→} from '~/components/icons/emoji'
    17→import {
    18→  BiCloudLightningRainFill,
    19→  BiCloudRainFill,
    20→  MdiCloud,
    21→  MdiSnowflake,
    22→  RiSunCloudyFill,
    23→} from '~/components/icons/weather'
    24→
    25→// 图标映射 - key 是后端返回的中文值
    26→const weatherIconMap: Record<string, FC> = {
    27→  晴: PhSunBold,
    28→  多云: RiSunCloudyFill,
    29→  阴: MdiCloud,
    30→  雪: MdiSnowflake,
    31→  雨: BiCloudRainFill,
    32→  雷雨: BiCloudLightningRainFill,
    33→}
    34→
    35→const moodIconMap: Record<string, FC> = {
    36→  开心: EmojiSmile,
    37→  伤心: EmojiSadTear,
    38→  大哭: EmojiSadCry,
    39→  生气: EmojiAngry,
    40→  痛苦: EmojiTired,
    41→  悲哀: EmojiMeh,
    42→  不快: EmojiMeh,
    43→  激动: EmojiGrinSquintTears,
    44→  担心: EmojiFrownOpen,
    45→  可怕: EmojiGrimace,
    46→  可恶: EmojiAngry,
    47→  绝望: EmojiFrownOpen,
    48→  焦虑: EmojiFlushed,
    49→}
    50→
    51→// 中文值到翻译 key 的映射
    52→export const weatherTranslationKeyMap: Record<string, string> = {
    53→  晴: 'weather_sunny',
    54→  多云: 'weather_cloudy',
    55→  阴: 'weather_overcast',
    56→  雪: 'weather_snow',
    57→  雨: 'weather_rain',
    58→  雷雨: 'weather_thunderstorm',
    59→}
    60→
    61→export const moodTranslationKeyMap: Record<string, string> = {
    62→  开心: 'mood_happy',
    63→  伤心: 'mood_sad',
    64→  大哭: 'mood_crying',
    65→  生气: 'mood_angry',
    66→  痛苦: 'mood_pain',
    67→  悲哀: 'mood_sorrow',
    68→  不快: 'mood_unhappy',
    69→  激动: 'mood_excited',
    70→  担心: 'mood_worried',
    71→  可怕: 'mood_scary',
    72→  可恶: 'mood_hateful',
    73→  绝望: 'mood_despair',
    74→  焦虑: 'mood_anxious',
    75→}
    76→
    77→export const weather2icon = (weather: string) => {
    78→  return React.createElement(weatherIconMap[weather] || PhSunBold)
    79→}
    80→
    81→export const mood2icon = (mood: string) => {
    82→  return React.createElement(moodIconMap[mood] || EmojiSmile)
    83→}
    84→
    85→export const getWeatherLabel = (
    86→  weather: string,
    87→  t: (key: string) => string,
    88→) => {
    89→  const key = weatherTranslationKeyMap[weather]
    90→  return key ? t(key) : weather
    91→}
    92→
    93→export const getMoodLabel = (mood: string, t: (key: string) => string) => {
    94→  const key = moodTranslationKeyMap[mood]
    95→  return key ? t(key) : mood
    96→}
    97→
```

```text
   399→    >

   440→const HeroHitokoto = ({
   441→  shouldAnimate,
   442→  delay,
   443→}: {
   444→  shouldAnimate: boolean
   445→  delay: number
   446→}) => {
   447→  const t = useTranslations('home')
   448→  const { custom, random } = useAppConfigSelector(
   449→    (config) => config.hero.hitokoto || {},
   450→  )!
   451→
   452→  return (

   454→      animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
   455→      className="max-w-[45ch] font-serif text-sm italic text-neutral-6 lg:text-right"
   456→      initial={shouldAnimate ? { opacity: 0, y: 12 } : false}
   457→      transition={{ ...softBouncePreset, delay: shouldAnimate ? delay : 0 }}
   458→    >

   463→      )}

   466→}
   467→
   468→const RemoteHitokotoQuote = () => {
   469→  const locale = useLocale()
   470→  const {
   471→    data: hitokoto,
   472→    isLoading,
   473→    refetch,
   474→    isRefetching,
   475→  } = useQuery({
   476→    queryKey: ['hitokoto', locale],
   477→    queryFn: () => fetchQuoteByLocale(locale),
   478→    refetchInterval: 300000,
   479→    staleTime: Infinity,
   480→    refetchOnMount: 'always',
   481→    meta: { persist: true },
   482→  })
   483→
   484→  if (isLoading || !hitokoto) return null
   485→
   486→  return (
   487→    <span className="group inline-flex items-center gap-1.5">
   488→      「{hitokoto}」
   489→      <MotionButtonBase
   490→        disabled={isRefetching}
   491→        className={clsxm(
   492→          'opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100',
   493→          isRefetching && 'animate-spin opacity-100',
   494→        )}
   495→        onClick={() => refetch()}
   496→      >
   497→        <i className="i-mingcute-refresh-2-line text-[10px]" />
   498→      </MotionButtonBase>
   499→    </span>
   500→  )
   501→}
   502→
```

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import NumberFlow from '@number-flow/react'
     4→import { useQuery, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     5→import { m, useReducedMotion } from 'motion/react'
     6→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     7→import { useMemo } from 'react'
     8→import { useInView } from 'react-intersection-observer'
     9→
    10→import { usePresentSubscribeModal } from '~/components/modules/subscribe'
    11→import { Link } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    12→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    13→import { toast } from '~/lib/toast'
    14→
    15→const SEASON_GREETING_KEYS = {
    16→  spring: 'ending_greeting_spring',
    17→  summer: 'ending_greeting_summer',
    18→  autumn: 'ending_greeting_autumn',
    19→  winter: 'ending_greeting_winter',
    20→} as const
    21→
    22→function getSeasonFromMonth(month: number) {
    23→  if (month >= 3 && month <= 5) return 'spring' as const
    24→  if (month >= 6 && month <= 8) return 'summer' as const
    25→  if (month >= 9 && month <= 11) return 'autumn' as const
    26→  return 'winter' as const
    27→}
    28→
    29→function getHolidayKey(month: number, day: number): string | null {
    30→  if (month === 1 && day <= 3) return 'windsock_newYear'
    31→  if (month === 2 && day === 14) return 'windsock_valentine'
    32→  if (month === 10 && day === 31) return 'windsock_halloween'
    33→  if (month === 12 && day >= 24 && day <= 25) return 'windsock_christmas'
    34→  return null
    35→}
    36→
    37→const SUBTLE_NAV = [
    38→  { key: 'ending_nav_friends', path: '/friends' },
    39→  { key: 'ending_nav_projects', path: '/projects' },
    40→  { key: 'ending_nav_says', path: '/says' },
    41→  { key: 'ending_nav_travel', path: 'https://travel.moe/go.html' },
    42→] as const
    43→
    44→const EASE = [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] as const
    45→
    46→export const Windsock = () => {
    47→  const t = useTranslations('home')
    48→  const tCommon = useTranslations('common')
    49→  const prefersReducedMotion = useReducedMotion()
    50→
    51→  const { ref, inView } = useInView({ threshold: 0.1, triggerOnce: true })
    52→
    53→  const isReturnVisit =
    54→    typeof window !== 'undefined' &&
    55→    sessionStorage.getItem('hero-entered') === '1'
    56→
    57→  const skipAnimation = prefersReducedMotion || isReturnVisit
    58→  const shouldAnimate = inView && !skipAnimation
    59→
    60→  const greetingKey = useMemo(() => {
    61→    const now = new Date()
    62→    const holiday = getHolidayKey(now.getMonth() + 1, now.getDate())
    63→    if (holiday) return holiday
    64→    return SEASON_GREETING_KEYS[getSeasonFromMonth(now.getMonth() + 1)]
    65→  }, [])
    66→
    67→  const likeQueryKey = ['site-like']
    68→  const { data: count } = useQuery({
    69→    queryKey: likeQueryKey,
    70→    queryFn: () => apiClient.proxy('like_this').get(),
    71→    refetchInterval: 1000 * 60 * 5,
    72→  })
    73→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    74→
    75→  const { present: presentSubscribe } = usePresentSubscribeModal()
    76→
    77→  const makeAnim = (delay: number) => ({
    78→    initial: skipAnimation ? false : ({ opacity: 0, y: 12 } as const),
    79→    animate:
    80→      shouldAnimate || isReturnVisit
    81→        ? ({ opacity: 1, y: 0 } as const)
    82→        : undefined,
    83→    transition: { duration: 0.6, ease: EASE, delay },
    84→  })
    85→
    86→  return (
    87→    <section
    88→      className="mx-auto mt-24 max-w-[1400px] px-6 pb-16 lg:px-12"
    89→      ref={ref}
    90→    >
    91→      {/* Greeting */}
    92→      <m.div
    93→        className="text-center font-serif text-lg tracking-[2px] text-neutral-7 lg:text-xl"
    94→        {...makeAnim(0)}
    95→      >
    96→        {t(greetingKey)}
    97→      </m.div>
    98→      <m.div
    99→        className="mb-10 text-center font-serif text-lg tracking-[2px] text-neutral-7 lg:mb-12 lg:text-xl"
   100→        {...makeAnim(0.1)}
   101→      >
   102→        {t('ending_invitation')}
   103→      </m.div>
   104→
   105→      {/* Interaction */}
   106→      <m.div
   107→        className="mb-12 flex items-center justify-center gap-8 lg:mb-14"
   108→        {...makeAnim(0.3)}
   109→      >
   110→        <button
   111→          className="group text-center"
   112→          onClick={() => {
   113→            apiClient
   114→              .proxy('like_this')
   115→              .post()
   116→              .then(() => {
   117→                queryClient.setQueryData(likeQueryKey, (prev: any) => prev + 1)
   118→              })
   119→
   120→            toast.success(tCommon('thanks'), {
   121→              iconElement: <i className="i-mingcute-heart-fill text-error" />,
   122→            })
   123→          }}
   124→        >
   125→          <div className="font-serif text-sm text-neutral-6 transition-colors duration-300 group-hover:text-accent">
   126→            {t('ending_like_label')}
   127→          </div>
   128→          <div className="font-serif text-xs italic text-neutral-5">
   129→            <span className="text-red-400">♥</span>{' '}
   130→            <NumberFlow value={count as any as number} />
   131→          </div>
   132→        </button>
   133→
   134→        <div className="h-6 w-px bg-neutral-200 dark:bg-neutral-700" />
   135→
   136→        <button className="group text-center" onClick={presentSubscribe}>
   137→          <div className="font-serif text-sm text-neutral-6 transition-colors duration-300 group-hover:text-accent">
   138→            {t('ending_subscribe_label')}
   139→          </div>
   140→          <div className="font-serif text-xs italic text-neutral-5">
   141→            {t('ending_subscribe_sub')}
   142→          </div>
   143→        </button>
   144→      </m.div>
   145→
   146→      {/* Subtle nav */}
   147→      <m.div
   148→        className="flex items-center justify-center gap-0 font-serif text-[11px] text-neutral-7/80 hover:text-neutral-7"
   149→        {...makeAnim(0.6)}
   150→      >
   151→        {SUBTLE_NAV.map((item, index) => (
   152→          <span className="inline-flex items-center" key={item.key}>
   153→            {index > 0 && <span className="mx-2.5">·</span>}
   154→            <Link
   155→              className="transition-colors duration-300 hover:text-accent"
   156→              href={item.path}
   157→            >
   158→              {t(item.key)}
   159→            </Link>
   160→          </span>
   161→        ))}
   162→      </m.div>
   163→    </section>
   164→  )
   165→}
   166→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
   291→
   292→const LoadMoreRepliesButton: FC<{
   293→  comment: CommentThreadViewItem
   294→}> = ({ comment }) => {
   295→  const t = useTranslations('comment')
   296→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
   297→  const refId = useCommentBoxRefIdValue()
   298→  const [remaining, setRemaining] = useState(
   299→    comment.replyWindow?.hiddenCount ?? 0,
   300→  )
   301→
   302→  const { mutateAsync, isPending } = useMutation({
   303→    mutationFn: async () => {
   304→      return apiClient.comment.getThreadReplies(comment.id, {
   305→        cursor: comment.replyWindow?.nextCursor,
   306→        size: 10,
   307→      })
   308→    },
   309→    onSuccess: (result) => {
   310→      const replyWindow = {
   311→        total:
   312→          comment.replyWindow?.total ??
   313→          comment.replyCount ??
   314→          result.replies.length,
   315→        returned: (comment.replies?.length ?? 0) + result.replies.length,
   316→        threshold: comment.replyWindow?.threshold ?? 20,
   317→        hasHidden: !result.done,
   318→        hiddenCount: result.remaining,
   319→        nextCursor: result.nextCursor,
   320→      }
   321→
   322→      queryClient.setQueryData<CommentThreadInfiniteData>(
   323→        buildCommentsQueryKey(refId),
   324→        (oldData) => {
   325→          if (!oldData) return oldData
   326→          return mergeThreadRepliesIntoPages(oldData, {
   327→            rootCommentId: comment.id,
   328→            replies: result.replies,
   329→            replyWindow,
   330→          })
   331→        },
   332→      )
   333→      setRemaining(result.remaining)
   334→    },
   335→  })
   336→
   337→  if (!comment.replyWindow?.hasHidden) return null
   338→
   339→  return (
   340→    <div className="ml-13 mt-2">
   341→      <button
   342→        className="cursor-pointer rounded-full border border-neutral-200 px-3 py-1 text-xs text-neutral-500 transition-colors hover:border-neutral-300 hover:text-neutral-800 dark:border-neutral-700 dark:text-neutral-400 dark:hover:border-neutral-600 dark:hover:text-neutral-200"
   343→        disabled={isPending}
   344→        type="button"
   345→        onClick={() => mutateAsync()}
   346→      >
   347→        {isPending
   348→          ? t('loading_more_replies')
   349→          : t('load_more_replies', {
   350→              count: remaining || comment.replyWindow.hiddenCount,
   351→            })}
   352→      </button>
   353→    </div>
   354→  )
   355→}
   356→
   357→const CommentHolderContext = createContext(atom(null as null | HTMLDivElement))
   358→
   359→const CommentBoxHolderProvider = () => {
   360→  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   361→  const commentBoxHolderElementAtom = use(CommentHolderContext)
   362→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
   363→    jotaiStore.set(commentBoxHolderElementAtom, ref.current)
   364→
   365→    return () => {
   366→      jotaiStore.set(commentBoxHolderElementAtom, null)
   367→    }
   368→  }, [commentBoxHolderElementAtom])
   369→  return <div ref={ref} />
   370→}
   371→
   372→export const CommentBoxHolderPortal = (props: PropsWithChildren) => {
   373→  const portalElement = useAtomValue(use(CommentHolderContext))
   374→
   375→  if (!portalElement) return null
   376→
   377→  return createPortal(props.children, portalElement)
   378→}
   379→
   380→const EditedCommentFooter: FC<{
   381→  commentId: string
   382→}> = ({ commentId }) => {
   383→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   384→  const editedAt = useCommentByIdSelector(
   385→    commentId,
   386→    useCallback((comment) => comment?.editedAt, []),
   387→  )
   388→  const ref = useCommentMarkdownContainerRef()
   389→
   390→  const lastNode = useMemo(() => {
   391→    if (!ref) return null
   392→    return ref.lastChild
   393→  }, [ref])
   394→  const lastNodeIsParagraph = useMemo(() => {
   395→    if (!lastNode) return false
   396→    return lastNode.nodeName === 'P'
   397→  }, [lastNode])
   398→
   399→  if (!editedAt) return null
   400→
   401→  const InlineEl = (
   402→    <FloatPopover
   403→      type="tooltip"
   404→      triggerElement={
   405→        <span className="ml-2 text-xs text-neutral-500">{t('edited')}</span>
   406→      }
   407→    >
   408→      <div>
   409→        <span>{t('edited_at')}</span> <RelativeTime date={editedAt} />
   410→      </div>
   411→    </FloatPopover>
   412→  )
   413→  if (!lastNodeIsParagraph) return <div className="[&_*]:!ml-0">{InlineEl}</div>
   414→
   415→  return createPortal(InlineEl, lastNode as HTMLDivElement)
   416→}
   417→
```

```text
     1→import type { AggregateRoot } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     2→import { simpleCamelcaseKeys } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     3→import { getTranslations } from 'next-intl/server'
     4→import RSS from 'rss'
     5→
     6→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
     7→
     8→export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'
     9→export const revalidate = 86400 // 1 day
    10→
    11→export async function GET(
    12→  _req: Request,
    13→  context: { params: Promise<{ locale: string }> },
    14→) {
    15→  const { locale } = await context.params
    16→  const tThinking = await getTranslations({
    17→    locale,
    18→    namespace: 'thinking',
    19→  })
    20→  const [agg, thinking] = await Promise.all([
    21→    fetch(apiClient.aggregate.proxy.toString(true), {
    22→      next: {
    23→        revalidate: 86400,
    24→      },
    25→    }).then(
    26→      async (res) =>
    27→        simpleCamelcaseKeys(await res.json()) as Promise<AggregateRoot>,
    28→    ),
    29→    apiClient.recently.getList({
    30→      size: 20,
    31→    }),
    32→  ])
    33→
    34→  const { title, description } = agg.seo
    35→  const localeMap: Record<string, string> = {
    36→    zh: 'zh-CN',
    37→    en: 'en-US',
    38→    ja: 'ja-JP',
    39→  }
    40→
    41→  const now = new Date()
    42→  const feed = new RSS({
    43→    title: `${tThinking('page_title')} - ${title}`,
    44→    description,
    45→    site_url: agg.url.webUrl,
    46→    feed_url: `${agg.url.webUrl}/${locale}/thinking/feed`,
    47→    language: localeMap[locale] || 'zh-CN',
    48→    generator: 'Shiro (https://github.com/Innei/Shiro)',
    49→    pubDate: now.toUTCString(),
    50→  })
    51→
    52→  for (const t of thinking.data) {
    53→    feed.item({
    54→      title: new Date(t.created).toLocaleDateString(localeMap[locale]),
    55→      description:
    56→        `${t.content}\n\n${t.ref?.title ? tThinking('feed_reference', { title: t.ref.title }) : ''}\n\n` +
    57→        ` <p style='text-align: right'>
    58→      <a href='${`${agg.url.webUrl}/${locale}/thinking/${t.id}`}'>${tThinking('feed_comment_cta')}</a>
    59→      </p>`,
    60→      url: `${agg.url.webUrl}/${locale}/thinking`,
    61→      guid: t.id,
    62→      date: t.created,
    63→    })
    64→  }
    65→
    66→  return new Response(feed.xml(), {
    67→    headers: {
    68→      'Content-Type': 'application/xml',
    69→      'Cache-Control': 'max-age=60, s-maxage=86400',
    70→      'CDN-Cache-Control': 'max-age=86400',
    71→      'Cloudflare-CDN-Cache-Control': 'max-age=86400',
    72→      'Vercel-CDN-Cache-Control': 'max-age=86400',
    73→    },
    74→  })
    75→}
    76→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { TimelineData } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     4→import { TimelineType } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     5→import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     6→import { useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation'
     7→import { useLocale, useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     8→import { useEffect } from 'react'
     9→
    10→import { NormalContainer } from '~/components/layout/container/Normal'
    11→import { TimelineProgress } from '~/components/modules/timeline/TimelineProgress'
    12→import { BackToTopFAB } from '~/components/ui/fab'
    13→import { TimelineList } from '~/components/ui/list/TimelineList'
    14→import { TimelineListItem } from '~/components/ui/list/TimelineListItem'
    15→import { TimelineYearGroup } from '~/components/ui/list/TimelineYearGroup'
    16→import { useRouter } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    17→import { buildNotePath } from '~/lib/note-route'
    18→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    19→import { springScrollToElement } from '~/lib/scroller'
    20→
    21→enum ArticleType {
    22→  Post,
    23→  Note,
    24→}
    25→type MapType = {
    26→  title: string
    27→  meta: string[]
    28→  date: Date
    29→  href: string
    30→
    31→  type: ArticleType
    32→  id: string
    33→  important?: boolean
    34→}
    35→
    36→const useJumpTo = () => {
    37→  useEffect(() => {
    38→    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
    39→      const jumpToId = new URLSearchParams(location.search).get('selectId')
    40→
    41→      if (!jumpToId) return
    42→
    43→      const target = document.querySelector(
    44→        `[data-id="${jumpToId}"]`,
    45→      ) as HTMLElement
    46→
    47→      if (!target) return
    48→
    49→      const $a = target.querySelector('a')
    50→
    51→      $a?.classList.add('no-shadow')
    52→      springScrollToElement(target, -500).then(() => {
    53→        target.animate(
    54→          [
    55→            {
    56→              backgroundColor: getComputedStyle(
    57→                document.documentElement,
    58→              ).getPropertyValue('accent-color'),
    59→            },
    60→            {
    61→              backgroundColor: 'transparent',
    62→            },
    63→          ],
    64→          {
    65→            duration: 1500,
    66→            easing: 'ease-in-out',
    67→            fill: 'both',
    68→            iterations: 1,
    69→          },
    70→        ).onfinish = () => $a?.classList.remove('no-shadow')
    71→      })
    72→
    73→      // wait for user focus
    74→    }, 100)
    75→
    76→    return () => clearTimeout(timer)
    77→  }, [])
    78→}
    79→
    80→export default function TimelinePage() {
    81→  const t = useTranslations('home')
    82→  const locale = useLocale()
    83→  const search = useSearchParams()
    84→  const router = useRouter()
    85→
    86→  const year = search.get('year')
    87→  const type = search.get('type') as 'post' | 'note'
    88→  const nextType = {
    89→    post: TimelineType.Post,
    90→    note: TimelineType.Note,
    91→  }[type]
    92→
    93→  const { data: initialData } = useQuery<TimelineData>({
    94→    queryKey: ['timeline'],
    95→    enabled: false,
    96→  })
    97→  const { data, refetch } = useQuery<TimelineData>({
    98→    queryKey: ['timeline', nextType, year, locale],
    99→    initialData,
   100→    queryFn: async ({ queryKey }) => {
   101→      const [, nextType, year] = queryKey as [string, TimelineType, string]
   102→      return await apiClient.aggregate
   103→        .getTimeline({
   104→          type: nextType,
   105→          year: +(year || 0) || undefined,
   106→        })
   107→        .then((res) => res.data)
   108→    },
   109→  })
   110→
   111→  useEffect(() => {
   112→    refetch()
   113→  }, [nextType])
   114→
   115→  useJumpTo()
   116→
   117→  if (!data) return null
   118→
   119→  const memory = search.get('bookmark') || search.get('memory')
   120→
   121→  const title = !memory ? t('timeline_page_title') : t('timeline_memory')
   122→
   123→  const { posts = [], notes = [] } = data
   124→  const sortedMap = new Map<number, MapType[]>()
   125→
   126→  if (!memory) {
   127→    posts.forEach((post) => {
   128→      const date = new Date(post.created)
   129→      const year = date.getFullYear()
   130→      const data: MapType = {
   131→        title: post.title,
   132→        meta: [post.category.name, t('timeline_post')],
   133→        date,
   134→        href: `/posts/${post.category.slug}/${post.slug}`,
   135→
   136→        type: ArticleType.Post,
   137→        id: post.id,
   138→      }
   139→      sortedMap.set(
   140→        year,
   141→        sortedMap.get(year) ? sortedMap.get(year)!.concat(data) : [data],
   142→      )
   143→    })
   144→  }
   145→
   146→  notes
   147→    .filter((n) => (memory ? n.bookmark : true))
   148→    .forEach((note) => {
   149→      const date = new Date(note.created)
   150→      const year = date.getFullYear()
   151→      const data: MapType = {
   152→        title: note.title,
   153→        meta: [
   154→          note.mood ? t('timeline_mood', { mood: note.mood }) : undefined,
   155→          note.weather
   156→            ? t('timeline_weather', { weather: note.weather })
   157→            : undefined,
   158→          t('timeline_note'),
   159→        ].filter(Boolean) as string[],
   160→        date,
   161→        href: buildNotePath(note),
   162→
   163→        type: ArticleType.Note,
   164→        id: note.id,
   165→        important: note.bookmark,
   166→      }
   167→
   168→      sortedMap.set(
   169→        year,
   170→        sortedMap.get(year) ? sortedMap.get(year)!.concat(data) : [data],
   171→      )
   172→    })
   173→
   174→  sortedMap.forEach((val, key) => {
   175→    sortedMap.set(
   176→      key,
   177→      val.sort((a, b) => b.date.getTime() - a.date.getTime()),
   178→    )
   179→  })
   180→
   181→  const sortedArr = Array.from(sortedMap)
   182→  const postCount = sortedArr
   183→    .flat(2)
   184→    .filter((i) => typeof i === 'object').length
   185→
   186→  return (
   187→    <NormalContainer>
   188→      <header className="mb-12">
   189→        <div className="mb-3">
   190→          <span className="text-[13px] tracking-widest text-neutral-10/30 uppercase">
   191→            {title}
   192→          </span>
   193→        </div>

   195→        <div className="mb-6 flex items-baseline gap-4">

   197→            {postCount}
   198→          </span>
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-15 07:25:19Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash**</summary>
批量恢复三种语言中被误删的 i18n key

```bash
python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json, subprocess

def git_show(path):
    return json.loads(subprocess.check_output(['git', 'show', f'HEAD:{path}'], text=True))

def read_json(path):
    with open(path) as f:
        return json.load(f)

def write_json(path, data):
    with open(path, 'w') as f:
        json.dump(data, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        f.write('\n')

# Keys to restore per namespace
restore_keys = {
    'common': [
        'actions_back', 'aria_donate', 'page_title_posts', 'page_title_projects',
        'page_title_friends', 'page_title_thinking', 'page_title_says',
        'redirecting_to', 'comment_placeholders',
        'footer_section_about', 'footer_about_site', 'footer_about_me',
        'footer_about_project', 'footer_section_more', 'footer_monitor',
        'footer_section_contact', 'footer_write_message', 'footer_send_email',
        'weather_sunny', 'weather_cloudy', 'weather_overcast',
        'weather_snow', 'weather_rain', 'weather_thunderstorm',
        'mood_happy', 'mood_sad', 'mood_crying', 'mood_angry',
        'mood_pain', 'mood_sorrow', 'mood_unhappy', 'mood_excited',
        'mood_worried', 'mood_scary', 'mood_hateful', 'mood_despair', 'mood_anxious',
    ],
    'comment': [
        'deleted_placeholder', 'owner_badge', 'commented_on_block',
        'avatar_alt', 'from_location', 'loading_more_replies', 'load_more_replies',
    ],
    'home': ['timeline_posts', 'timeline_keep_going', 'timeline_look_back'],
    'post': [
        'category_prefix', 'category_count_prefix', 'category_count_suffix',
        'category_empty', 'tag_title',
    ],
    'thinking': ['feed_reference', 'feed_comment_cta'],
}

locales = ['zh', 'en', 'ja']
base = 'apps/web/src/messages'

for locale in locales:
    for ns, keys in restore_keys.items():
        rel_path = f'{base}/{locale}/{ns}.json'
        current = read_json(rel_path)
        original = git_show(rel_path)
        
        restored = []
        for key in keys:
            if key not in current and key in original:
                current[key] = original[key]
                restored.append(key)
        
        if restored:
            write_json(rel_path, current)
            print(f'{locale}/{ns}.json: restored {len(restored)} keys: {", ".join(restored)}')

print('\nDone.')
PYEOF
```

```text
   199→// --- Sub-components ---
   200→
   201→const HeroWritingStats = ({
   202→  layout,
   203→  shouldAnimate,
   204→}: {
   205→  layout: 'horizontal' | 'vertical'
   206→  shouldAnimate: boolean
   207→}) => {
   208→  const t = useTranslations('home')
   209→  const { data } = useQuery({
   210→    queryKey: ['site-info'],
   211→    queryFn: () =>
   212→      apiClient.aggregate.proxy.site_info.get<{
   213→        postCount: number
   214→        noteCount: number
   215→        totalWordCount: number
   216→        firstPublishDate: string | null
   217→      }>(),
   218→    staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000,
   219→  })
   220→
   221→  const articleCount = (data?.postCount ?? 0) + (data?.noteCount ?? 0)
   222→  const wordCountWan = data?.totalWordCount
   223→    ? Math.round(data.totalWordCount / 10000)
   224→    : 0
   225→  const days = data?.firstPublishDate
   226→    ? Math.floor(
   227→        (Date.now() - new Date(data.firstPublishDate).getTime()) / 86400000,
   228→      )
   229→    : 0
   230→
   231→  const items = [
   232→    { value: articleCount, label: t('hero_stat_posts') },
   233→    { value: wordCountWan, label: t('hero_stat_words_unit') },
   234→    { value: days, label: t('hero_stat_days') },
   235→  ]
   236→
   237→  return (
   238→    <div
   239→      className={clsx(
   240→        layout === 'vertical'
   241→          ? 'flex flex-col gap-1 text-right font-serif italic'
   242→          : 'flex gap-5 font-serif italic',
   243→        'text-xs text-neutral-6',
   244→        cn(shouldAnimate, 'hero-enter-stats'),
   245→      )}
   246→    >
   247→      {items.map((item, index) => (
   248→        <Fragment key={item.label}>
   249→          {layout === 'horizontal' && index > 0 && (
   250→            <span className="text-neutral-5">·</span>
   251→          )}
   252→          <div>
   253→            <span className="not-italic text-2xl font-medium text-neutral-7">
   254→              <NumberSmoothTransition>{item.value}</NumberSmoothTransition>
   255→            </span>{' '}
   256→            {item.label}
   257→          </div>
   258→        </Fragment>
   259→      ))}
   260→    </div>
   261→  )
   262→}
   263→
   264→const HeroRecentWriting = ({ shouldAnimate }: { shouldAnimate: boolean }) => {
   265→  const t = useTranslations('home')
   266→  const homeData = useHomeQueryData()
   267→  const { posts = [], notes = [] } = homeData || {}
   268→
   269→  const recentItems = useMemo(() => {
   270→    const all = [
   271→      ...posts.map((p: any) => ({
   272→        title: p.title,
   273→        href: routeBuilder(Routes.Post, {
   274→          category: p.category.slug,
   275→          slug: p.slug,
   276→        }),
   277→        created: p.created,
   278→      })),
   279→      ...notes.map((n: any) => ({
   280→        title: n.title,
   281→        href: buildNotePath(n),
   282→        created: n.created,
   283→      })),
   284→    ]
   285→    return all
   286→      .sort(
   287→        (a, b) => new Date(b.created).getTime() - new Date(a.created).getTime(),
   288→      )
   289→      .slice(0, 3)
   290→  }, [posts, notes])
   291→
   292→  if (!homeData) {
   293→    return (
   294→      <div className={cn(shouldAnimate, 'hero-enter-writing')}>
   295→        <div className="mb-3 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-neutral-6">
   296→          {t('hero_recently_writing')}
   297→        </div>
   298→        <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
   299→          {[65, 80, 55].map((w) => (
   300→            <div
   301→              className="h-4 animate-pulse rounded bg-neutral-200/50 dark:bg-neutral-700/30"
   302→              key={w}
   303→              style={{ width: `${w}%` }}
   304→            />
   305→          ))}
   306→        </div>
   307→      </div>
   308→    )
   309→  }
   310→
   311→  if (recentItems.length === 0) return null
   312→
   313→  return (
   314→    <div className={cn(shouldAnimate, 'hero-enter-writing')}>
   315→      <div className="mb-3 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-neutral-6">
   316→        {t('hero_recently_writing')}
   317→      </div>
   318→      <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
   319→        {recentItems.map((item) => (
   320→          <Link
   321→            className="block border-b border-neutral-200/40 pb-1.5 text-base text-neutral-7 transition-colors duration-300 hover:text-accent dark:border-neutral-700/40"
   322→            href={item.href}
   323→            key={item.href}
   324→          >
   325→            {item.title}
   326→          </Link>
   327→        ))}
   328→      </div>
   329→    </div>
   330→  )
   331→}
   332→
   333→const HeroSocialIcons = ({
   334→  socialIds,
   335→  shouldAnimate,
   336→}: {
   337→  socialIds: Record<string, string> | undefined
   338→  shouldAnimate: boolean
   339→}) => (
   340→  <div className={clsxm('flex gap-4', cn(shouldAnimate, 'hero-enter-social'))}>
   341→    {Object.entries(socialIds || noopObj).map(([type, id]: any) => {
   342→      if (!isSupportIcon(type)) return null
   343→      return <SocialIcon id={id} key={type} type={type} variant="mono" />
   344→    })}
   345→  </div>
   346→)
   347→
   348→const HeroHitokoto = ({ shouldAnimate }: { shouldAnimate: boolean }) => {
   349→  const t = useTranslations('home')
   350→  const { custom, random } = useAppConfigSelector(
   351→    (config) => config.hero.hitokoto || {},
   352→  )!
   353→
   354→  return (
   355→    <div
   356→      className={clsxm(
   357→        'max-w-[45ch] font-serif text-sm italic text-neutral-6 lg:text-right',
   358→        cn(shouldAnimate, 'hero-enter-hitokoto'),
   359→      )}
   360→    >
   361→      {random ? (
   362→        <RemoteHitokotoQuote />
   363→      ) : (
   364→        <>「{custom ?? t('hero_default_hitokoto')}」</>
   365→      )}
   366→    </div>
   367→  )
   368→}
   369→
   370→const RemoteHitokotoQuote = () => {
   371→  const locale = useLocale()
   372→  const {
   373→    data: hitokoto,
   374→    isLoading,
   375→    refetch,
   376→    isRefetching,
   377→  } = useQuery({
   378→    queryKey: ['hitokoto', locale],
   379→    queryFn: () => fetchQuoteByLocale(locale),
   380→    refetchInterval: 300000,
   381→    staleTime: Infinity,
   382→    refetchOnMount: 'always',
   383→    meta: { persist: true },
   384→  })
   385→
   386→  if (isLoading || !hitokoto) return null
   387→
   388→  return (
   389→    <span className="group inline-flex items-center gap-1.5">
   390→      「{hitokoto}」
   391→      <MotionButtonBase
   392→        disabled={isRefetching}
   393→        className={clsxm(
   394→          'opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100',
   395→          isRefetching && 'animate-spin opacity-100',
   396→        )}
   397→        onClick={() => refetch()}
   398→      >
   399→        <i className="i-mingcute-refresh-2-line text-[10px]" />
   400→      </MotionButtonBase>
   401→    </span>
   402→  )
   403→}
   404→
```
